creator: reichelt.dev@gmail.com
text: This is f'n stupid. In order to make this work you have to do a 'make extract' in /usr/ports/www/nginx. This creates the files in /var/ports bla bla, which you can edit. Be careful with upgrading with portmaster, because it doesnt work! The edited file is rolled back all the time. Therefore make and install it by yourself or do a 'make reinstall'.
